headline: Dermatologist in KK Nagar, Chennai
subheadline: AIIMS-trained consultant dermatologists offering complete skin, hair, and cosmetic care under one roof.
metaDescription: Dermatologist in KK Nagar, Chennai. Three AIIMS-trained consultant dermatologists offering hair, skin, and cosmetic care. Book a consultation.

whyPatientsChoose.title: Three Consultant Dermatologists
whyPatientsChoose.description: Hair transplantation, paediatric dermatology, and dermatosurgery expertise all under one clinic.

whyPatientsChoose.title: Complete Care, One Location
whyPatientsChoose.description: From acne to hair transplant to pediatric skin concerns -- no need to be referred elsewhere for common conditions.

doctorsPerspectiveStructured.patientConcern: How do I know which doctor to see for my concern?
doctorsPerspectiveStructured.response: Our front desk can help match you to the right doctor based on your concern when you call or book -- whether that's hair, general skin, or a paediatric issue.

processSteps.title: Book
processSteps.description: Call or book online, and we'll help match you to the right doctor for your concern.

processSteps.title: Evaluation
processSteps.description: A thorough consultation addressing your specific skin, hair, or cosmetic concern.

processSteps.title: Treatment Plan
processSteps.description: A plan built around your specific diagnosis and goals, not a generic package.

landingFaqs.question: What conditions do you treat?
landingFaqs.answer: We treat the full range of skin, hair, and nail conditions, plus cosmetic dermatology and paediatric dermatology -- see our services page for the complete list.

landingFaqs.question: Do I need to know which doctor to book with?
landingFaqs.answer: No -- our front desk can help match you to the right doctor for your specific concern.

landingFaqs.question: Where exactly are you located?
landingFaqs.answer: 39/2, RK Shanmugam Salai, KK Nagar, Chennai - 600078, convenient to Ashok Nagar, Vadapalani, Virugambakkam, and Ramapuram.
